teepublic.main_tag: Must be a specific 2-3 word 'Niche Phrase'. NO ultra-broad single words or product terms ('shirt', 'sticker'). Must make sense when followed by 'T-Shirt' (e.g. 'Tired Sloth' → 'Tired Sloth T-Shirt').
teepublic.title: [Animal] [Phrase] | [Humor Type] Meme. Must contain the Main Tag verbatim. 6-9 words, ~50 characters max. No product terms.

redbubble.title: [Primary Keyword] - [Secondary Keyword] | [Style/Vibe] Design. Under 50-60 characters total. Never write product format terms.
redbubble.includes: At least 1 sticker-specific tag from curl [animal] sticker query

etsy_png.title_rules: First 40 characters most important. Include 'PNG' in first 60 characters. No 'shirt', 'sticker', 'mug' (selling the FILE, not the product).
etsy_png.tag_structure: Tier 1 (1-3): primary buyer searches. Tier 2 (4-7): use case & format. Tier 3 (8-10): style & vibe. Tier 4 (11-13): long-tail niche.
etsy_png.description: 5-6 paragraphs, 1000-1500 characters. First 160 characters CRITICAL — Etsy search preview.
etsy_png.category: Craft Supplies & Tools > Digital > Clip Art & Image Files
